ogTitle: Mulguthrie vs Muli Muli: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mulguthrie and Muli Muli.
heading: Mulguthrie vs Muli Muli — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mulguthrie, New South Wales and Muli Muli, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mulguthrie has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Muli Muli (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mulguthrie or Muli Muli safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mulguthrie has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Muli Muli scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mulguthrie scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Muli Muli scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mulguthrie or Muli Muli?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mulguthrie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
